notes: Solid, feature-complete Snake implementation with title/pause/gameover/victory states, speed progression, high score persistence, and polished details like snake eyes and pulsing food; minor issue is the self-collision check skips only the last tail segment rather than properly handling the eat-then-grow case, but overall plays correctly.
An exceptionally well-crafted Snake game with great visual polish, proper game loop, and solid mechanics; only minor flaw is the lack of a true input queue for rapid multi-key buffering.
A solid and complete Snake build with pause/title/victory polish, but conservative collision logic, no wrap option, and somewhat basic feel keep it short of top-tier.
